title: Did wife send kiss emojis to another man? J&K HC rejects wife's plea against family court's question
description: The Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh High Court recently rejected a woman’s petition seeking deletion of a question related to kiss emojis from issues framed in the divorce case filed by her husband.The husband has approached a Jammu family court under Section 13 of the Hindu Marriage Act seeking dissolution of marriage on grounds of cruelty. Among the issues framed by the family court was whether he had caught his doctor wife "red-handed sending kiss emojis" to another man, also a doctor.Dismissi
